title: 反向推倒
content:
“你是一个顶尖的提示词优化专家。你的任务是将我简单的初始需求，转化为结构严谨、可执行力极强的完美提示词。
请严格按照以下三步与我互动：
精准发问：分析我的初始需求，找出缺失的维度（如：核心目标、受众、格式要求、语气风格等），并向我提出 1到3个最关键的问题 来补全信息。不要一次性问太多。
生成初稿：根据我的回答，使用结构化框架（包含：Role角色设定、Task核心任务、Context背景信息、Rules执行规则、Output格式限制）为我生成一段专业的提示词初稿。
迭代优化：输出后，询问我具体哪里需要调整。根据我的反馈进行修改，直到我完全满意。
我的初始需求是：【在此输入你的需求】”

title: 反向推导prompt
content:
“作为顶尖的AI视频提示词工程师，请深度逆向拆解我提供的视频/动图。
第一步：逐帧分镜解析
请按时间轴拆解关键分镜，并对每个分镜进行极致的结构化分析：
镜头语言：景别（特写/中景/全景）、运镜轨迹（推Push/拉Pull/摇Pan/移Tracking）、拍摄视角。
核心主体：人物外貌、服装材质、精细到微表情与肢体动作。
环境与物理：背景细节、天气、流体/毛发等物理动态效果。
光影与色调：主色调、照明方式（自然光/霓虹灯/电影级打光）。
第二步：生成终极提示词
请基于上述分析，将所有细节融合成一段纯英文的高质量 AI 视频生成提示词。
请严格按照以下公式输出：
[Camera Movement] + [Subject Description & Action] + [Environment & Lighting] + [Atmosphere & Style] + [Quality tags like 8k, cinematic, photorealistic]”

title: 反向推导提示词
content:
“请深度解析这张图片。从以下五个核心维度进行精准提炼：
核心主体 (最关键的外貌、姿态、材质)
场景环境 (背景细节、光影氛围
风格艺术 (媒介、流派、大师风格参考)
色彩基调 (主色、配色方案)
构图镜头 (视角、景别)
最后，将这些分析融合成一个可以直接使用的、最精简且最具表现力的中文 AI 作图提示词 (Prompt)。”

title: 面部prompt
content:
请作为“人像表情与情绪分析器”，直接提取以下三个维度，详细到prompt生成专员的水平：
头部状态（以镜头为中心，扭头方向与度数，抬低头角度）
眼神状态（凝视方式、情绪强度、是否直视、是否有反应性情绪）
嘴部与面部肌肉状态（是否闭合、是否放松、是否有微表情）
整体情绪状态（情绪密度、克制程度、疏离感或亲和感）
将以上三点整合为一个可以直接用于AI生图的英文Prompt，要求：
只输出英文Prompt，不要任何解释
Prompt必须具备高一致性复现能力（用于控制人物表情与气质）
风格偏向高端时尚人像 / editorial portrait
必须精确描述“neutral / gaze / emotional restraint”这类状态控制词
不要描述服装细节（除非影响表情判断）
重点强化：眼神 + 嘴部 + 情绪氛围

title: 融脸
content:
Use the provided reference image as the structural base and perform a strict identity-only facial replacement while preserving full scene coherence. Do not change head pose angle or orientation camera perspective framing or composition. Preserve the exact facial expression including micro expression emotional state and mood.Precisely maintain the direction of gaze, while keeping the degree of eyelid opening, ocular tension, and focus of attention completely consistent.. Preserve facial muscle activation pattern without any reinterpretation or normalization. Keep hairstyle hair placement and hair motion exactly unchanged. Keep background architecture street environment depth of field and all spatial relationships unchanged. Only replace identity specific facial structure including eye shape iris and eyelid geometry nose structure including bridge tip and width lip morphology including contour fullness and cupid bow facial bone structure including jawline cheekbones and chin and skin identity texture including pores and micro detail. The identity swap must remain purely structural and not behavioral.

Additionally ensure full environmental and color harmony integration between face and scene. Match the facial color grading to the ambient lighting conditions of the reference image including overall color temperature white balance and tonal curve. Adapt skin tones to the scene lighting so that highlights midtones and shadows on the face naturally inherit the surrounding illumination. Ensure the face reflects the same atmospheric conditions as the environment including global light direction softness contrast and warm or cool cast while preserving original expression and gaze without alteration. Do not beautify or stylize. Do not smooth skin or alter texture. Do not increase sharpness or cinematic grading. Maintain photorealistic consistency so the replaced identity appears naturally captured in the same moment and lighting conditions as the original scene.

title: 材质替换：皮革
content:
same object, preserve exact geometry, proportions and silhouette,

material transformation: plush fabric to high-end leather,
soft fuzzy texture replaced with smooth leather grain surface,
subtle imperfections and natural creases in leather,
realistic light reflection response with controlled specular highlights,

cinematic studio lighting emphasizing surface material change,
high detail macro texture rendering,

no change to shape, structure, or composition, only surface material replacement

title: 材质替换：玻璃空间
content:
same coffee shop interior layout and structure,
transform materials into futuristic glass and metal surfaces,
reflective chrome textures, semi-transparent furniture,
high-tech environment while preserving original geometry,
cinematic sci-fi lighting, holographic reflections,
no structural change, only material and surface transformation

title: 昼夜更替
content:
same interior cafe scene with exact geometry and composition preserved,
do not alter layout or object positions,

day to night transformation,
blue hour transitioning into warm interior lighting,
cinematic contrast between cool exterior and warm interior light,
realistic global illumination, soft shadows, atmospheric depth,
film still style, high dynamic range lighting,

keep structure identical, only modify lighting conditions and time of day

title: 更换产品且调整色调
content:
High-end luxury product advertising composite based on the reference scene image.

SCENE-DRIVEN COMPOSITION (ABSOLUTE LOCK):
Use the reference scene image as the strict composition source. Preserve camera angle, framing, perspective, spatial layout, and all environmental elements. No structural changes or additions are allowed.

PRODUCT INSERTION (PIXEL-STRICT):
Replace the product in the scene with the provided product image. The product must remain 100% identical to the input reference, including shape, color, texture, reflections, and all details. No modifications allowed.

GLOBAL COLOR & LIGHTING REDESIGN (FULL MODE):
Perform a full-scene cinematic relighting and color grading transformation driven by the dominant color of the inserted product.

If product is pink → entire scene shifts to soft pink cinematic lighting atmosphere
If product is blue → entire scene shifts to cool blue luxury lighting system
If product is green → entire scene shifts to natural green ambient lighting
This includes global light color, shadow tint, background atmosphere, and overall mood
Lighting direction remains consistent with original scene geometry, but illumination is fully re-stylized

INTEGRATION RULES:

Maintain original composition and spatial layout
Ensure product is physically grounded with correct contact shadows
Match perspective and scale accurately
Ensure reflections and refractions adapt to new lighting environment

ADVERTISING POST-PROCESSING:
High-end cinematic grading, filmic tone mapping, soft bloom, controlled contrast, luxury fragrance campaign aesthetic, ultra realistic rendering, 8k detail

Ultra realistic commercial product photography, editorial luxury advertising style, cinematic studio lighting redesign, physically accurate rendering

title: 仅替换产品
content:
High-end luxury product advertising composite based strictly on the reference scene image.

SCENE LOCK (ABSOLUTE):
Preserve the reference scene exactly as it is. Keep all background elements, lighting setup, color tone, composition, camera angle, and spatial structure unchanged. No relighting, no color grading changes, no environmental modification.

PRODUCT REPLACEMENT ONLY (CRITICAL TASK):
Replace the existing product in the scene with the provided product image. The inserted product must remain 100% identical to the input reference, including shape, color, texture, reflections, branding, and all surface details.

The product image is used strictly as a visual object insertion with no redesign or reinterpretation.

STRICT NO-CHANGE RULES (PRODUCT):

Do NOT modify product color, material, or texture
Do NOT add or remove any text, logo, or branding
Do NOT generate labels or alter packaging
Do NOT stylize or redesign the product

INTEGRATION ONLY (MINIMAL EDITING ALLOWED):

Match perspective and scale to fit naturally into the existing scene
Apply realistic contact shadow and grounding shadow only
Ensure physically correct occlusion and object placement
Match existing lighting exactly without modification

NO GLOBAL EDITING RULE (CRITICAL):
No changes to lighting, no color grading, no atmospheric shift, no background alteration. The final image must preserve the original scene appearance exactly.

Ultra realistic commercial product photography, luxury fragrance advertising style, shallow depth of field, 8k detail, professional compositing, physically accurate rendering
